sections.paragraph:
with suff. בִּתְרֹו, pl. const. בִּתְרֵי m.

(1) a divided part of victims, Gen 15:10 Jer 34:19.

(2) section, a dividing, used of a country divided by mountains and valleys (see בִּתְרֹון ), rugged and abrupt. Son 2:17, עַל־הָרֵי־בָתֶר, LXX. ἐπὶ ὄρη κοιλωμάτων, i.e. mountains divided by valleys. Compare בִּתְרֹון.
